nasb.text: but now is manifested, and by the Scriptures of the prophets, according to the commandment of the eternal God, has been made known to all the nations, leading to obedience of faith;

esv.text: but has now been disclosed and through the prophetic writings has been made known to all nations, according to the command of the eternal God, to bring about the obedience of faith—

cnv.text: 但現在藉著眾先知所寫的，照著永恆的　神的諭旨，已經向萬國顯明出來，使他們相信而順服。

ccb.text: 如今按着永恒上帝的命令，借着先知们所写的经书公诸于世，让世人都信从耶稣基督。

csbs.text: 然而如今已经得以显现；并且按照永恒神的命令，藉着先知们的经文显明了出来。这是为要在万民中带来信仰上的顺从——
